Additional Context

ITEM DETAILS
Key Dependencies • Polaris platform APIs (Q2 2026)
• Maestro orchestration layer (Q3 2026)
• Natural language processing service (In development)
Risk Areas Medium Risk NLP accuracy for domain-specific commands
Medium Risk Integration complexity with legacy systems
Recent Wins • Completed ZDC deep-dive with 12 sponsor users (March 10)
• Reduced design-dev TAT from 3 weeks to 2 weeks
• Validated 3 priority use cases with field teams
Next Milestones • Complete high-fidelity prototype (April 15, 2026)
• Council validation session (April 5, 2026)
• Field demo script finalization (April 30, 2026)
